title: How to Celebrate or Commiserate | #shorts
full_text: election day and I am ready to either celebrate or commiserate I am prepared if the person I want to win wins I am ready with a an amazing chocolate chip double chocolate chip cookie cuz it's the reigning champion of all cookies and you know we are ready we're going to have it if the person I don't want wins wins because that could happen I have brought myself a very sad looking oatmeal raisin cookie because who are we kidding nobody ever eats this if they have the choice to eat something else and if there's no decision and we are hanging in a balance because the ballots and the equal and the electoral votes and the hanging Chads and all of that then you know what then we're just going to go
